name: Rug Radar Live
description: Risk scanner for liquidity drops, creator sells, authority flags, holder concentration, abnormal volume, and LP weirdness.
degenPitch: A smoke alarm for tokens that start smelling wrong.
whatItDoes: Scores token risk signals without claiming certainty.
Sells receipt-gated risk notes and alerts.
Can pause copy settings when max pain or risk triggers fire.
cursorPrompt: Build a Rug Radar Live risk scanner with DNA x402. Flag liquidity, creator, holder, authority, volume, and LP warning signals, sell receipt-gated risk notes, and never claim guaranteed detection.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Rug Radar Live risk scanner with DNA x402. Flag liquidity, creator, holder, authority, volume, and LP warning signals, sell receipt-gated risk notes, and never claim guaranteed detection.
exampleFlow: Optional copy settings pause is suggested
receiptProofBehavior: No claim of guaranteed detection is allowed.
